meaning: vt.取消,省略,省略发音,不予考虑删节
examples: These habits of thinking elide the difference between what is common and what is normal.
Indeed the two aims may be beginning to elide.
To reflect idiomatic use, code examples in this document elide semicolons using these rules.
Harrington was a socialist, who, to his subsequent regret, and much like Friedan, chose to elide that fact when he wrote his book.
Against that, the Sewel Convention (named after Lord (John) Sewel who piloted the 1998 Act through the Upper house as a minister) is designed to elide cross-border arguments.
